title: Session & User Services

classes.name: BaseService
classes.notes: Base class for all services; provides this.services (service locator), this.db, this.log, this.errors, this.config, this.modules

classes.name: SessionService
methods: _init(): void — gets DB, starts flush loop
create_session(user, meta): Promise<Session> — INSERT into sessions, cacheSession()
getSession(uuid): Promise<Session|undefined> — #getSession + touch + cacheSession(pending) + #removeInternalValues
get_user_sessions(user): Promise<Session[]> — reads redis set by user_id, maps cached sessions
remove_session(uuid): Promise — invalidateCachedSession + DELETE from sessions
cacheSession(session, options): Promise<void> — SET in redis (EX 300s), SADD to user-set, manage flush-pending set
getCachedSession(uuid): Promise<Session|null> — GET from redis, parse JSON, validate uuid
invalidateCachedSession(uuid, userId?): Promise<void> — DEL from redis, SREM from sets
getSessionCacheKey(uuid): string
getSessionUserSetKey(userId): string
getSessionFlushLockKey(uuid): string
#getSession(uuid): Promise<Session|undefined> — cache-first, fallback to DB tryHardRead + get_user()
#updateSessions(): Promise<void> — periodic flush: UPDATE sessions + UPDATE user.last_activity_ts + update UserRedisCacheSpace
#scheduleSessionFlushLoop(): void — recursive setTimeout with random interval
#getRandomFlushIntervalMs(): number
#removeInternalValues(session): Session — strips last_touch, last_store, user_id, flushPending
redis_keys: session-cache:flush-pending — set of UUIDs pending DB flush

classes.name: UserService
methods: _init(): void — gets DB_WRITE connection
'__on_filesystem.ready'(): void — ensures system user home dir exists via GetUserService + generate_default_fsentries()
get_system_dir(): FSNode
generate_default_fsentries({ user }): Promise<void> — bulk INSERT 8 default dirs (Home/Trash/AppData/Desktop/Documents/Pictures/Videos/Public), UPDATE user folder UUIDs/IDs, invalidate_cached_user()
updateUserMetadata(userId, updatedMetadata): Promise<void> — SELECT metadata, merge, UPDATE user, GetUserService.get_user(force:true), invalidate_cached_user_by_id()
db_tables: fsentries (uuid, parent_uid, user_id, name, path, is_dir, ...)

classes.name: GetUserService
properties: id_properties: Set<string> — {username, uuid, id, email, referral_code}
methods: _construct(): void — initializes id_properties Set
_init(): void — registers PermissionImplicator 'user-set-own' with PermissionService
get_user(options): Promise<User|null> — cache-first via UserRedisCacheSpace, fallback get_user_(), then svc_whoami.get_details(), cache result
get_user_(options): Promise<User|null> — DB read (replica first, then primary) by any id_property; parses metadata JSON
refresh_actor(actor): Promise<Actor> — force-refreshes actor.type.user via get_user(force:true)
register_id_property(prop): void — adds custom identifying property to Set
classes.options_flags: cached (default true), force (bypass replica, use primary)

classes.name: ReferralCodeService
methods: _construct(): void — sets referral constants
_init(): void — subscribes to 'user.email-confirmed' event → on_verified()
gen_referral_code(user): Promise<string> — seeded RNG (seedrandom), up to 5 tries UPDATE user.referral_code, invalidate_cached_user_by_id()

on_verified(user): Promise<void> — checks referred_by, consumeMonthlyReferralSlot(), svc_size.add_storage() ×2, meteringService.updateAddonCredit() ×2, svc_email.send_email(), svc_notification.notify()
consumeMonthlyReferralSlot(referredByUserId): Promise<number> — sudo() → kvStore.incr() + kvStore.expireAt()
getMonthlyReferralKey(referredByUserId, nowMs?): string
getNextMonthTimestamp(nowMs?): number
getUser(query): Promise<User> — delegates to helpers.get_user()

classes.name: Emailservice
classes.note: Exported as 'Emailservice' (lowercase s), registered as 'email' service
properties: templates: Object — 12 named templates (new-referral, approved-for-listing, listing-rejected, email_change_request, email_verification_code, email_verification_link, email_password_recovery, enabled_2fa, disabled_2fa, share_by_username, share_by_email, password_change_notification)
template_fns: Object — compiled Handlebars template functions keyed by template name
methods: _construct(): void — compiles all templates with Handlebars + dedent, registers nl2br helper
_init(): void — no-op
get_transport_(): nodemailer.Transport — creates transport from this.config (SMTP)
send_email(user, template, values): Promise<void> — renders template, calls transporter.sendMail(from: no-reply@puter.com)
sendMail(params): void — raw passthrough to nodemailer transporter.sendMail()

classes.name: UserRedisCacheSpace
classes.notes: Static helper — getByProperty(prop, val), setUser(user, opts), key(prop, val). Used by SessionService and GetUserService for user-level Redis caching.

relationships: SessionService depends_on UserRedisCacheSpace (update user cache on flush)
UserService depends_on GetUserService (get-user service for system user lookup)
GetUserService depends_on database service (DB_READ, replica + primary)
GetUserService depends_on whoami service (enriches user object)
GetUserService depends_on permission service (registers implicator in _init)
ReferralCodeService depends_on Emailservice (send_email on referral verified)
ReferralCodeService depends_on su service (sudo() for kvStore ops)
key_flows: Session creation: create_session() → INSERT DB → cacheSession() → redis SET + SADD user-set
Session retrieval: getSession() → getCachedSession() [redis GET] or DB tryHardRead → touch + mark pending flush → #removeInternalValues

Session flush loop: #scheduleSessionFlushLoop() → #updateSessions() → for each pending UUID: acquire redis lock → getCachedSession() → UPDATE sessions DB → UPDATE user.last_activity_ts DB → update UserRedisCacheSpace
Session removal: remove_session() → getCachedSession() + DB SELECT user_id → invalidateCachedSession() → DELETE sessions DB
User lookup (GetUserService): get_user() → UserRedisCacheSpace.getByProperty() [cache hit] OR get_user_() [DB read replica→primary] → svc_whoami.get_details() → UserRedisCacheSpace.setUser()
User metadata update: UserService.updateUserMetadata() → DB SELECT metadata → merge → DB UPDATE → GetUserService.get_user(force:true) → invalidate_cached_user_by_id()
Default fs entries: UserService.generate_default_fsentries() → bulk INSERT 8 dirs into fsentries → UPDATE user table with folder UUIDs/IDs → invalidate cache
Referral code generation: gen_referral_code(user) → seedrandom → generate_random_code(8) → UPDATE user.referral_code (up to 5 retries) → invalidate cache

Referral verification: on 'user.email-confirmed' event → ReferralCodeService.on_verified() → consumeMonthlyReferralSlot() → svc_size.add_storage ×2 → meteringService.updateAddonCredit ×2 → EmailService.send_email(referred_by, 'new-referral') → NotificationService.notify()
Email delivery: EmailService.send_email(user, template, values) → template_fns[template](values) [Handlebars compile] → get_transport_() [nodemailer SMTP] → transporter.sendMail()
important_notes: EmailService class is named 'Emailservice' (lowercase s) in source code
SessionService uses distributed locking in Redis to prevent duplicate DB flushes across instances
GetUserService supports pluggable id_properties via register_id_property(); defaults: username, uuid, id, email, referral_code
UserService listens to 'filesystem.ready' event to bootstrap system user home directory
ReferralCodeService enforces MAX_REFERRALS_PER_MONTH=20 via Redis kvStore counter (monthly rolling)
Referral rewards: +1 GB storage + $0.25 credit to both referrer and referee
All services use service locator pattern via this.services.get('service-name')
